response:
<<Microsoft AI Ethics Guide>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust deeply.
Trust builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect people well.
People need fair tools.
Tools must be safe.
Safe systems help all.
All users matter much.
Much care goes in.
In every code line.
Lines form great apps.
Section 2
AI acts with care.
Care guides smart choices.
Choices affect real lives.
Lives change for good.
Good outcomes need rules.
Rules stop bad acts.
Acts harm no one.
One person matters most.
Most systems need checks.
Checks ensure fair play.
Section 3
Fairness is key here.
Here bias gets removed.
Removed bias helps all.
All groups get help.
Help comes from data.
Data must be clean.
Clean data stops errors.
Errors hurt trust levels.
Levels drop if wrong.
Wrong choices break faith.
Section 4
Privacy stays top priority.
Priority means strong locks.
Locks keep secrets safe.
Safe data stays private.
Private info needs care.
Care prevents data leaks.
Leaks ruin user trust.
Trust breaks if lost.
Lost trust is hard.
Hard to regain trust.
Section 5
Security protects our users.
Users need strong walls.
Walls block bad bots.
Bots try to hack.
Hack attempts get stopped.
Stopped threats keep peace.
Peace allows safe use.
Use of tools grows.
Growth brings new ideas.
Ideas spark innovation fast.
Section 6
Transparency helps everyone see.
See how models work.
Work involves clear steps.
Steps explain every choice.
Choice logic must show.
Show users what happens.
Happens inside code blocks.
Blocks form logic paths.
Paths lead to results.
Results should be clear.
Section 7
Accountability defines our role.
Role requires clear owners.
Owners take full blame.
Blame fixes broken parts.
Parts get repaired fast.
Fast repairs restore order.
Order keeps systems running.
Running systems need tests.
Tests find hidden bugs.
Bugs get fixed now.
Section 8
Innovation drives future growth.
Growth needs ethical bounds.
Bounds keep things safe.
Safe progress helps society.
Society benefits from tech.
Tech serves human needs.
